name: One-Pan Potatoes & Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: Microwave for 6 to 10 minutes until tender
1 green bell pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. While the potatoes are cooking in the microwave, season the beef with garlic pepper and heat the olive oil in a large skillet over high heat.
2. Add the beef to the skillet and toss for 3 minutes until browned.
3. Remove the beef and add the green bell pepper. Toss for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Add the potatoes back into the skillet and sauté for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Return the beef to the skillet and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes until the potatoes are tender through.
6. Season with salt to taste. Serves 4.
